0.name: Environment Setup
0.notes: SurrealDB 3.0.2 in-memory with --unauthenticated flag. Python 3.9.6 with surrealdb client via websocket.

1.name: Memory Graph Schema
1.theory_check: Experience nodes store cues rather than complete records because memory is reconstructive. Meaning is rebuilt at retrieval through spreading activation, shaped by connections made since encoding. A cue activated through different pathways at different times yields different understanding. This is the difference between a log and a mind — the same experience, approached from a new angle, reveals new significance.

2.name: Retrieval Engine
2.theory_check: A node weakly connected to 3 active nodes (hub: 0.63) activates more strongly than a node with 1 strong connection (leaf: 0.56). This is associative surprise — the system surfaces unexpected connections that are densely woven into the current activation pattern. This is the difference between search (you know what you want) and remembering (relevant memories announce themselves through accumulated resonance across multiple paths).

3.name: Forgetting and Vitality
3.theory_check: Created node with strong edges (0.8, 0.7). After aggressive decay: edges at 0.005 but node salience at 0.74 — available but inaccessible. Spreading activation confirms inaccessibility. New semantically similar node triggers embedding-based reconnection, creating a 'rediscovered' edge. This sequence models the difference between availability and accessibility: a memory can exist but be unreachable. Ghost signals are the 'I know I knew this' feeling. Rediscovery through a new experience creating a fresh bridge is recovering something you thought was lost via a path that didn't exist when you first forgot it.

4.name: Default Mode Loop
4.theory_check: Curiosity (0.7->0.31) decays while impulse (0.7->2.95) builds pressure over same 5 cycles. Curiosities are about the world and fade when unattended. Impulses are about incomplete cognition and insist until acted on. REST produces zero new nodes — it is a mode, not the absence of one. The tick-5 insight from the reflection doc emerged from deliberate stillness, not from production. The repertoire selector is not a pipeline: different state conditions produce different mode combinations, including redirecting away from self-referential depth.

5.name: Multi-Instance and Sensorium
5.theory_check: Suspended a 'naming' task. While suspended, created concept:shower_insight with edges to anamnetron and meno. Reconstructed the task via spreading activation — shower_insight appeared at activation 2.44 in the reconstructed context. The agent returned to the task with understanding it didn't have when it left. This is not a simulation of the shower thought — it is a genuine mechanism: reconstruction through spreading activation naturally incorporates new graph structure created during the suspension.

6.name: Self-Authored Skills
6.theory_check: With no behavioural history, compile produces zero skills — no hallucinated templates. With 1 reflection, still nothing — threshold respected. Only with 3+ repeated consolidation reflections does the system compile a graph_consolidation skill. Skills emerge from accumulated evidence in the graph, not from predefined templates applied to empty data. The difference between a skill library and procedural memory is that procedural memory requires the procedures to have actually been performed.

7a.name: Close the Stubs
changes: mode_compile calls compile_skills() — returns real patterns/skills
mode_register accepts signal dict, creates experience nodes with edges
mode_connect derives signal from impulses/curiosities/recent state
mode_connect calls hebbian_learning on co-activated nodes
mode_wonder creates reflection nodes before fading curiosities (grief, not gc)
run_tick passes signal through REGISTER -> CONNECT pipeline
_derive_signal tries: impulse pressure > recent signal > recent experience > curiosity > fallback

7b.name: Complete the Agent
changes: connect tool: spreading activation + Hebbian learning, grouped output by node type
run_loop tool: calls run_tick() with optional signal, reports per-mode results
compile tool: calls compile_skills(), handles no-history case gracefully
Conversation history fix: append final text only, not intermediate tool-runner messages
SYSTEM_PROMPT updated with all 10 tools and default-mode-between-conversations guidance
ALL_TOOLS expanded from 7 to 10
7b.blocker: anthropic SDK import hangs on Python 3.9.6 — agent.py cannot be run end-to-end until Python is upgraded or anthropic version pinned. All underlying logic verified via direct function tests.

7c.name: Embeddings and Persistence
changes: Created src/embeddings.py: embed(), cosine_similarity(), embed_and_store(), embed_seed_data()
Ollama + nomic-embed-text (768-dim vectors) via HTTP API at localhost:11434
Wired embed_and_store into agent.py remember and create_concept tools
ensure_schema() calls embed_seed_data() on fresh seed — idempotent
reconnect_via_embedding in forgetting.py now works with real vectors
db.py reads SURREAL_URL from environment for flexible deployment
Created .gitignore (data/, __pycache__, skills/*.md, loop-state.json)
7c.notes: Reconnection test confirmed: islanded node with similarity 0.72 to new node was reconnected via embedding bridge. The three-tier forgetting system is now fully operational with real semantic vectors.

7d.name: Integration Test and First Run
changes: Created tests/test_integration.py: 20-tick loop with 3 seeded signals
Graph grew by 5 reflection nodes across 20 ticks
Vitality drifted 0.915 -> 0.894 (natural decay)
Edge weights range: 0.19 — 1.0 (Hebbian strengthening active)
Mode repertoire varied: SENSE(20), CONNECT(14), WONDER(13), TEND(5), REFLECT(5), REST(4)
7d.theory_check: The substrate is mechanically sound — modes vary by state, vitality drifts, edges strengthen through co-activation, reflections are generated on schedule. But the 20-tick loop without Claude as thinking entity produces formulaic output: reflections all follow the same template, no curiosities or impulses emerge, and REGISTER doesn't create experience nodes from signals because the mode selector doesn't pick REGISTER for signal ticks. The zombie test result is clear: the code works but nothing is home. This is expected — the mechanical substrate provides the body, Claude provides the mind. The system needs to run with the agent (src/agent.py) driving the loop through actual conversation to produce genuine accumulation. The anthropic SDK Python version blocker must be resolved first.
blockers: anthropic SDK import hangs on Python 3.9.6 — agent.py cannot run end-to-end
REGISTER mode not selected by repertoire selector when signals are provided
Reflections are formulaic (template-based) — need Claude to generate genuine ones

notes: Phases 0-7d complete. Mechanical substrate fully validated.
Remaining blocker: anthropic SDK hangs on Python 3.9.6 — need Python upgrade for agent.py to run
REGISTER mode needs signal-aware selection in repertoire_selector
Agent uses Anthropic Python SDK with @beta_tool — no MCP, in-process execution
